description: Thanks to Henry for the correction.

(Both white and black are 'big groups' - Aren't in need of eyes and are alive unconditionally.)FORCE]AB[fq]LB[go:0]AW[mq]LB[lo:5]AW[lq]AP[goproblems]

(;W[ks];B[is]C[Well done! ^^RIGHT])
(;W[fs];B[go]C[Black wins the ko. Since it's the endgame and white can't do anything with the little triangle within, F1 isn't a ko-threat.. :(]AW[gr]LB[gr:A])
(;W[gr];B[go]C[Black wins the ko. Since it's the endgame and white can't do anything with the little triangle within, G2 isn't a ko-threat.. :(]AW[fs]LB[fs:A])))
